test_vectors.desc: Initial idle state: first process() sends icache read request for PC=0x80000000
ICache accepts the read request, state transitions from req_sent to wait_data
ICache returns valid instruction (ADDI x1, x0, 1 = 0x00100093), transitions to pending_ready
Decode accepts instruction, pending_ready cleared, PC advances from 0x80000000 to 0x80000004
Branch request: PC updated to 0x80001000, squash_decode_o=1, FSM registers reset
Invalidate (IFENCE): icache_flush=1, icache_invalidate=1, all FSM state cleared
ICache returns error: pending_fault_fetch flagged, instruction not output on fetch_instr_o
Decode accepts fault: PC does NOT advance (fault leaves PC unchanged, exception handled via branch)
Branch with privilege change to S-mode (priv=1): icache_priv reflects new privilege
Back-to-back fetch: icache accept+valid+decode accept held high for 3 cycles, 2 instructions complete
Decode stall: fetch_accept_i=0 keeps instruction in pending_ready, PC not advancing
Branch overrides pending_ready instruction: branch PC takes priority over pending instruction
Invalidate while waiting for icache: FSM reset (req_sent/wait_data/pending_ready all cleared)
ICache accept+valid in same cycle after idle: request sent, accepted, data returned in sequence
